title: Mutagen
description: Browser monster-builder roguelike: pick mutations under a 15-point budget, fight auto-battles with a card deck, level up, fuse, survive. Vite+TS, dice combat with type matrix and status effects, 75 FLUX2-Pro sprites indexed by single and multi-mutation sets, hit-reaction visuals tied to attack type + level.
license_notes: Runtime: Vite (MIT), TypeScript (Apache-2.0), no runtime deps. Monster sprites generated via FLUX2-Pro through a local artworks/ pipeline; dev-only: ImageMagick (Apache-2.0-style) for sprite resize and thumbnail composition.
